yeah.

so with 24 XR Traffic, it was like an insane success and so much so that actually one of the board members has actually led our Series A recently.

then often what we see, so for instance, Abnormal Security is great example, or RAM.

## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between SmartSuite and GrowthX Labs for content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SmartSuite has reached $4M ARR with organic growth, focusing on PLG and enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers a comprehensive content marketing service, including strategy, creation, and technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9K/month for \~25 articles, with a $20K initial 60-day strategy phase](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-powered workflows and human expertise to create high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

## Topics

### SmartSuite's Current Growth Status

  - [Recently crossed $4M ARR mark](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [No dedicated marketing team yet; growth has been organic](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [95% of leads come through the website](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [70% of deals are self-serve (PLG)](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Three salespeople handle larger, enterprise opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Aiming to expand into mid-market and enterprise segments](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Approach to Content Marketing

  - [Focus on creating publisher-like content that provides value before extracting it](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Use AI-powered workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Comprehensive process: research, strategy setting, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating a unique voice and style for each client](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Includes technical SEO and programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Service Offering

  - [Initial 60-day strategy phase for $20K](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Ongoing content creation starting at $9K/month (\~ 25 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Average engagement around $15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Services include managing director, editor, writers, image generation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Additional work streams available (e.g., content repurposing, case studies, newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/fzw35o6bGaRXEusukfBcRTs_HCpF5yPe?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### Technical Capabilities
